title: critonia hospitalis
intro: Critonia hospitalis is a plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the aster family and commonly known as Hierba de la Estrella or Starflower. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Critonia hospitalis include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and relieving digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Critonia hospitalis typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
